title: Visualization pilot evidence
goal: Run an internal pilot of the Leitstand visualization layer with real Cabinet, RepoBrief, Chronik, WGX, and semantAH artifacts and record degraded-source behavior before rollout.

acceptance.assertion: The pilot uses real source artifacts and records their source commits, digests, and freshness states.
Missing, stale, corrupt, and export-safety-failing inputs are visible in the pilot report.
The pilot introduces no default task dispatch, external mutation, or source repair from the UI.

metadata.outcome: The visualization pilot is implemented and merged through Leitstand PR #179 with digest-bound real source identities, explicit synthetic fault-injection labels and a tested view-only boundary.

validation.github_checks: all required PR #179 checks passed before merge

verified_acceptance.real-artifact-pilot: The machine report records digest- and commit-bound real artifacts for Systemkatalog, RepoGround, Chronik, WGX and semantAH while copying no private source content.
verified_acceptance.degraded-behavior-recorded: The report and tests cover missing, corrupt, stale and export-safety-failing states. Missing/corrupt inputs are explicitly synthetic fault injection and cannot be mistaken for live incidents; stale and export-safety failure include real artifacts.
verified_acceptance.no-write-paths: The report declares an empty write-capability set and forbids task dispatch, source repair, repository mutation, merge, deployment and external refresh; the change adds only reports and tests.
